content: Our bodies thrive on a 1:2 ratio of omega 6 to omega 3 fatty acids.
Most of us consume about a 17:1 ratio of omega 6 to omega 3.
Supplementation with fish oil will decrease your cortisol levels, plain and simple.
Fish oil also is shown to suppress the lipogenic genes that are responsible for fat gain.
Supplements are just that, a supplement, and it is always best to try your hardest to get your vitamins and minerals from the diet.
